title: symphytum officinale var. bohemicum
intro: Symphytum officinale var. bohemicum, also known as Comfrey, is a perennial herb belonging to the borage family. It is widely used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, bruises, and sprains. The health benefits of Comfrey include its ability to promote tissue repair, reduce pain and inflammation, and support digestive health. Comfrey is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream, and is also used in salves and ointments to accelerate healing and reduce scarring.
